title: IntegrateRigor: annotation-free integration optimization for cell identity recovery reveals cancer-immune interface niches.
publicationName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
journalName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
snippet: Integrating single-cell and spatial transcriptomics data across batches is essential for recovering comparable cell identities-including cell types, subtypes, and states-as a prerequisite for downstream analyses in multi-condition and large-scale studies. This task remains challenging because between-batch variation removal often conflicts with cell identit...
